route: NBDDocViewer overlay (#nbdv-overlay) opened from V2 finalize (Retail Quote / Insurance Scope / Internal)
label: 💾 Save to Customer
expected_behavior: handleSave(): when the doc viewer was opened from the V2 estimate finalize flow, the open() call passes onSave=async()=>save(), so this button runs estimate-v2-ui.js save() — the same Firestore _saveEstimate write as the builder's bottom-left Save button — persisting the estimate to the customer record.
reveal_state: after:d4-estimate-061/062/063 (V2 finalize button → NBDDocViewer overlay opens; distinct from the d5-docs doc-generator path)
notes: The NBDDocViewer action bar is shared with the docs flow (inventoried in d5-docs anchored at after:d5-docs-045), but reachable here from estimate finalize with a different onSave wiring (writes the estimate, not a generated doc). The server-render path (_tryServerRenderEstimate) bypasses the viewer; this row applies to the HTML-fallback render.

route: NBDDocViewer overlay (#nbdv-overlay) opened from V2 finalize
label: ✉ Email
expected_behavior: handleEmail(): opens a mailto: link with the estimate document link prefilled so the rep can email the customer-facing Retail Quote / Insurance Scope.
notes: mailto hand-off only (opens the OS mail client) — not a direct server send; danger:send marks it because it surfaces a customer-facing document for emailing. Same button as d5-docs but reached from the estimate finalize flow.

route: NBDDocViewer overlay (#nbdv-overlay) opened from V2 finalize
label: 🖨 Print
expected_behavior: handlePrint(): calls the preview iframe's contentWindow.print() to print the rendered estimate document.
notes: Same doc-viewer button as d5-docs; this row records its reachability from the estimate finalize flow.

route: NBDDocViewer overlay (#nbdv-overlay) opened from V2 finalize
label: 📄 Download PDF
expected_behavior: handlePdf(): renders the estimate document to PDF client-side via html2pdf.js and triggers a browser file download (filename NBD-<RetailQuote|InsuranceScope|InternalEstimateView>-<date>.pdf).
notes: Primary download path for the customer-facing estimate when the server-render path is unavailable.

route: NBDDocViewer signing iframe (srcdoc) opened by V2 sendForSignature() after a successful BoldSign send
label: Open signing page ↗
expected_behavior: Anchor target=_blank to the BoldSign embedUrl. Shown only when the in-iframe Brave/Firefox-shield probe (iframe.contentWindow.location.href readable = block page injected) flips the overlay to data-state=blocked; lets the rep open the real signing page in a new tab when the embed was blocked.
reveal_state: after:d4-estimate-065 (sendForSignature success returns embedUrl) → modal:nbdEsignOverlay (blocked branch only)
notes: Lives inside a sandboxed srcdoc iframe (no allow-same-origin), so it is not a top-level dashboard selector — exercise via the signing overlay. Only reachable after a real BoldSign envelope is created (blocked without a BoldSign key per memory). Drive only to the open-in-new-tab boundary.

route: NBDDocViewer signing iframe (srcdoc) opened by V2 sendForSignature()
label: Open ↗ (corner pin)
expected_behavior: Always-visible bottom-right escape-hatch anchor (target=_blank) to the BoldSign embedUrl; opens the signing page in a new tab regardless of whether the embed loaded or was shield-blocked.
reveal_state: after:d4-estimate-065 (sendForSignature success returns embedUrl) → modal:nbdEsignOverlay (always present in the signing srcdoc)
notes: Universal escape hatch independent of the block probe. Same srcdoc-iframe caveat as gap-esign-estimate-005. Drive only to the new-tab boundary.
